

---
title: "10_rank_lut"
output: html_document
params:
  # ---- curve selector ----
  curve: "q025"   # one of: "q50", "q16", "q025"

  # ---- species filter (filters species list only; never affects folder names) ----
  do_mammals: true
  do_birds: true
  species_csv: "Data/Clean/species_table.csv"

  # ---- analysis contract roots ----
  ana_subdir: "ana"          # under Spatial/Outputs_<curve>/
  int_dir: "rank_int"        # ana/rank_int/stage_0001/<species>.tif  (from Script 9)
  lut_dir: "rank_lut"        # ana/rank_lut/lut_stage_0001.rds        (this script)

  # ---- GRASS / fasterRaster plumbing (REQUIRED) ----
  grassDir: "C:/Program Files/GRASS GIS 8.4"

  # ---- run controls ----
  build: true
  overwrite: false
  auto_align: false          # should be FALSE if Script 9 already aligned to template
  use_monotone_cache: true   # reuse previous stage lookup if # of 1-cells unchanged

  # ---- stage selection ----
  restrict_stages: ""        # e.g. "1:20" or "" for all stages found in ana/rank_int/

  # ---- output naming ----
  lut_prefix: "lut_stage_"   # lut_stage_0001.rds, ...
  fp_name: "fp.rds"
---

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 00_checks — ALL setup + preconditions + helpers
# After this chunk, the rest of the script is "do the work".
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(terra)
  library(sf)
  library(igraph)
  library(data.table)
  library(fasterRaster)
})

sf::sf_use_s2(TRUE)

# -------------------------
# tiny helpers
# -------------------------
assert <- function(ok, msg) if (!isTRUE(ok)) stop(msg, call. = FALSE)
need_file <- function(p, label = p) assert(file.exists(p), paste0("Missing file: ", label, "\nPath: ", p))
need_dir  <- function(p, label = p) assert(dir.exists(p),  paste0("Missing dir: ",  label, "\nPath: ", p))

# scientificName -> stable ID (matches Script 11 logic)
sid <- function(sci) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(sci))
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("[/\\\\:<>\"|?*]+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_]+", "_", x)
  x <- gsub("_+", "_", x)
  gsub("^_|_$", "", x)
}

# scientificName -> stable filename (matches Scripts 8/9)
pname <- function(sci) paste0(sid(sci), ".tif")

# stage tag used everywhere in ana/
stagetag <- function(s) sprintf("stage_%04d", as.integer(s))

# numeric parser (handles chars like "12 km2", "NA", "")
num <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- trimws(x)
  x[x %in% c("", "NA", "NaN", "NULL", "null")] <- NA_character_
  # keep digits + decimal + sign + exponent
  x <- gsub("[^0-9eE\\+\\-\\.]+", "", x)
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

# optional stage selector like "1:20" or "" (NULL means "all")
parse_stages <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  if (!nzchar(x)) return(NULL)
  out <- tryCatch(eval(parse(text = paste0("c(", x, ")"))), error = function(e) NULL)
  assert(!is.null(out) && length(out) > 0L, "Could not parse params$restrict_stages (try '1:20' or '').")
  as.integer(out)
}

# align (only used if auto_align=TRUE)
align_to_template <- function(r, tpl) {
  if (!terra::compareGeom(r, tpl, stopOnError = FALSE)) {
    if (!terra::same.crs(r, tpl)) r <- terra::project(r, tpl, method = "near")
    r <- terra::resample(r, tpl, method = "near")
  }
  r
}

# empty lookup table (stable schema)
empty_lut <- function() {
  data.table(
    scientificName = character(),
    species        = character(),
    patch_id       = integer(),
    pu_id          = integer(),
    patch_area_km2 = numeric()
  )
}

# -------------------------
# params
# -------------------------
curve <- as.character(params$curve)
assert(curve %in% c("q50", "q16", "q025"),
       "params$curve must be one of: 'q50', 'q16', 'q025'.")

do_m <- isTRUE(params$do_mammals)
do_b <- isTRUE(params$do_birds)
assert(do_m || do_b, "Both do_mammals and do_birds are FALSE -> nothing to do.")

do_build <- isTRUE(params$build)
overwrite <- isTRUE(params$overwrite)
auto_align <- isTRUE(params$auto_align)
use_cache <- isTRUE(params$use_monotone_cache)

# -------------------------
# paths (global contract)
# -------------------------
out_curve <- file.path("Spatial", paste0("Outputs_", curve))
ana <- file.path(out_curve, as.character(params$ana_subdir))
int_root <- file.path(ana, as.character(params$int_dir))
lut_root <- file.path(ana, as.character(params$lut_dir))

need_dir("Spatial", "Spatial/")
need_dir(out_curve, paste0("Spatial/Outputs_", curve))
dir.create(ana, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
need_dir(ana, "ana/")
need_dir(int_root, "ana/rank_int/ (from Script 9)")

dir.create(lut_root, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
need_dir(lut_root, "ana/rank_lut/")

lut_prefix <- as.character(params$lut_prefix)
fp_path <- file.path(lut_root, as.character(params$fp_name))

# -------------------------
# GRASS/fasterRaster plumbing (REQUIRED)
# -------------------------
grassDir <- as.character(params$grassDir)
assert(dir.exists(grassDir), paste0("GRASS directory does not exist:\n", grassDir))
fasterRaster::faster(grassDir = grassDir)

# -------------------------
# stages (from ana/rank_int/stage_#### folders)
# -------------------------
stage_dirs <- list.dirs(int_root, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE)
assert(length(stage_dirs) > 0L, paste0("No stage folders found under: ", int_root))

stage_base <- basename(stage_dirs)
stage_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(sub("^stage_([0-9]{4})$", "\\1", stage_base)))
ok_stage <- is.finite(stage_num)

st <- data.table(stage = stage_num[ok_stage], dir = stage_dirs[ok_stage])
setorder(st, stage)
assert(nrow(st) > 0L, "Stage folders exist but none matched 'stage_0001' format.")

sel <- parse_stages(params$restrict_stages)
if (!is.null(sel)) {
  st <- st[stage %in% sel]
  assert(nrow(st) > 0L, "After restrict_stages filtering, no stages remain.")
}

# -------------------------
# species + thresholds (taxon-gated)
# -------------------------
species_csv <- as.character(params$species_csv)
need_file(species_csv, "species_csv")

# required columns for Script 10 logic
sp0 <- fread(species_csv, showProgress = FALSE)
need_cols <- c("scientificName", "className", "min_patch_size", "min_pop_size", "dispersal_dist")
miss <- setdiff(need_cols, names(sp0))
assert(length(miss) == 0L, paste0("species_table.csv missing columns: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", ")))

sp0[, scientificName := trimws(as.character(scientificName))]
sp0[, class_lc := tolower(trimws(as.character(className)))]
sp0 <- sp0[class_lc %in% c("mammalia", "aves")]
sp0 <- sp0[(class_lc == "mammalia" & do_m) | (class_lc == "aves" & do_b)]
assert(nrow(sp0) > 0L, "After taxon gating, zero species remain.")

sp <- sp0[, .(
  scientificName,
  class_lc,
  species = sid(scientificName),
  file    = pname(scientificName),
  min_patch_km2 = num(min_patch_size),
  min_pop_km2   = num(min_pop_size),
  disp_km       = num(dispersal_dist)
)]

assert(anyDuplicated(sp$species) == 0L, "Duplicate species IDs after sanitization.")
assert(anyDuplicated(tolower(sp$file)) == 0L, "Duplicate filenames after sanitization.")
assert(all(is.finite(sp$min_patch_km2) & sp$min_patch_km2 > 0), "Invalid min_patch_size for selected species.")
assert(all(is.finite(sp$min_pop_km2) & sp$min_pop_km2 > 0), "Invalid min_pop_size for selected species.")
assert(all(is.finite(sp$disp_km) & sp$disp_km >= 0), "Invalid dispersal_dist for selected species.")

# -------------------------
# verify inputs exist + choose a template raster
#   - we only need ONE template; Script 9 should have aligned outputs already
# -------------------------
# pick first stage + first species as template
tpl_path <- file.path(st$dir[1], sp$file[1])
need_file(tpl_path, "template tif (stage_####/<species>.tif)")
tpl <- terra::rast(tpl_path)

# stage/species file inventory (hard fail early, once)
for (k in seq_len(nrow(st))) {
  d <- st$dir[k]
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(sp))) {
    need_file(file.path(d, sp$file[i]), paste0("missing input tif: ", basename(d), "/", sp$file[i]))
  }
  # optional geometry check (cheap: check first species only)
  if (!auto_align) {
    r1 <- terra::rast(file.path(d, sp$file[1]))
    assert(terra::compareGeom(tpl, r1, stopOnError = FALSE),
           paste0("Geometry mismatch vs template in: ", basename(d), " (auto_align=FALSE)."))
    rm(r1)
  }
}

# cell area raster (km^2 per cell) on template grid
cell_km <- terra::cellSize(tpl, unit = "km")

# -------------------------
# outputs + run gating
# -------------------------
lut_files <- file.path(lut_root, sprintf("%s%04d.rds", lut_prefix, st$stage))
complete <- all(file.exists(lut_files))

run_work <- do_build && (overwrite || !complete)

cat("\n=== Script 10: rank_lut ===\n")
cat("curve        :", curve, "\n")
cat("out_curve    :", out_curve, "\n")
cat("ana          :", ana, "\n")
cat("rank_int     :", int_root, "\n")
cat("rank_lut     :", lut_root, "\n")
cat("n stages     :", nrow(st), "\n")
cat("n species    :", nrow(sp), "\n")
cat("auto_align   :", auto_align, "\n")
cat("use_cache    :", use_cache, "\n")
cat("build        :", do_build, "\n")
cat("overwrite    :", overwrite, "\n")
cat("complete     :", complete, "\n")
cat("=> will run  :", run_work, "\n\n")
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 01_build — write ana/rank_lut/lut_stage_####.rds
#
# For each stage and each species:
#   1) clump patches (rook adjacency) using fasterRaster (GRASS)
#   2) compute patch areas (km^2)
#   3) drop patches < min_patch_km2
#   4) group remaining patches into population units (PU) by dispersal distance
#   5) drop PUs < min_pop_km2
#
# Output schema (superset of what Script 11 needs):
#   scientificName, species, patch_id, pu_id, patch_area_km2
# ============================================================

# --- core worker: build LUT for ONE species at ONE stage ---
build_lut_one <- function(tif_path, sci, sp_id, min_patch_km2, min_pop_km2, disp_km,
                          tpl, cell_km,
                          auto_align = FALSE,
                          use_cache  = FALSE,
                          prev_n1    = NA_real_) {

  # NOTE: Script 9 already writes 1/NA rasters; we still coerce safely after reading.
  r <- terra::rast(tif_path)
  if (auto_align) r <- align_to_template(r, tpl)

  # Fast empty check: since raster is 1/NA, sum == count of remaining cells
  n1 <- tryCatch(terra::global(r, "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[1, 1], error = function(e) 0)
  n1 <- if (is.na(n1)) 0 else as.numeric(n1)

  # ---- NEW: monotone-cache shortcut here (no extra raster read anywhere else) ----
  if (isTRUE(use_cache) && is.finite(prev_n1) && isTRUE(n1 == prev_n1)) {
    rm(r); gc(FALSE)
    return(list(n1 = n1, reused = TRUE, lut = NULL))
  }

  if (!is.finite(n1) || n1 <= 0) {
    rm(r); gc(FALSE)
    return(list(n1 = n1, reused = FALSE, lut = empty_lut()))
  }

  # Trim to bounding box of remaining cells (major memory saver)
  r01 <- terra::ifel(!is.na(r) & (r != 0), 1L, NA_integer_)
  rm(r); gc(FALSE)
  r01 <- tryCatch(terra::trim(r01), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(r01) || terra::ncell(r01) == 0) {
    rm(r01); gc(FALSE)
    return(list(n1 = n1, reused = FALSE, lut = empty_lut()))
  }

  # --- clump using fasterRaster (GRASS) ---
  # diagonal=FALSE => rook adjacency (4-neighbor)
  cl <- tryCatch({
    terra::rast(fasterRaster::clump(fasterRaster::fast(r01), diagonal = FALSE))
  }, error = function(e) {
    stop("fasterRaster::clump failed on: ", tif_path, "\nReason: ", conditionMessage(e), call. = FALSE)
  })
  rm(r01); gc(FALSE)

  # --- patch areas (km^2) ---
  # crop cell area raster to clump extent (avoid full-grid zonal)
  ca <- terra::crop(cell_km, cl, snap = "out")
  if (!terra::compareGeom(ca, cl, stopOnError = FALSE)) ca <- terra::resample(ca, cl, method = "near")

  area_df <- as.data.frame(terra::zonal(ca, cl, "sum", na.rm = TRUE))
  rm(ca); gc(FALSE)
  if (!nrow(area_df)) {
    rm(cl); gc(FALSE)
    return(list(n1 = n1, reused = FALSE, lut = empty_lut()))
  }
  setDT(area_df)
  setnames(area_df, c("patch_old", "patch_area_km2"))
  area_df <- area_df[is.finite(patch_old) & is.finite(patch_area_km2)]

  # --- filter patches by min_patch_km2 ---
  keep_old <- area_df[patch_area_km2 >= min_patch_km2, patch_old]
  if (!length(keep_old)) {
    rm(cl); gc(FALSE)
    return(list(n1 = n1, reused = FALSE, lut = empty_lut()))
  }

  # map kept patch IDs to 1..n (patch_id)
  keep_old <- sort(as.integer(keep_old))
  map <- data.table(patch_old = keep_old, patch_id = seq_along(keep_old))
  # keep only those clumps
  kept <- terra::classify(cl, rcl = as.matrix(map), others = NA_integer_)
  rm(cl); gc(FALSE)

  # area table for kept patches (patch_id)
  area <- merge(map, area_df, by = "patch_old", all.x = TRUE)
  area[, patch_old := NULL]
  setkey(area, patch_id)

  # --- polygonize kept patches (for distance graph) ---
  pol <- terra::as.polygons(kept, values = TRUE, dissolve = TRUE)
  rm(kept); gc(FALSE)
  if (is.null(pol) || terra::nrow(pol) == 0) return(list(n1 = n1, reused = FALSE, lut = empty_lut()))

  sfp <- sf::st_as_sf(pol)
  rm(pol); gc(FALSE)
  if (!nrow(sfp)) return(list(n1 = n1, reused = FALSE, lut = empty_lut()))

  # get the patch_id column name produced by as.polygons
  val_col <- setdiff(names(sfp), attr(sfp, "sf_column"))[1]
  sfp$patch_id <- as.integer(sfp[[val_col]])
  sfp <- sfp[is.finite(sfp$patch_id), ]
  if (!nrow(sfp)) return(list(n1 = n1, reused = FALSE, lut = empty_lut()))

  # --- PU grouping by dispersal distance ---
  if (isTRUE(disp_km == 0)) {
    sfp$pu_raw <- seq_len(nrow(sfp))
  } else {
    nb <- sf::st_is_within_distance(sfp, sfp, dist = disp_km * 1000)
    g <- igraph::graph_from_adj_list(nb, mode = "out") |>
      igraph::as_undirected("collapse") |>
      igraph::simplify(remove.multiple = TRUE, remove.loops = TRUE)
    memb <- igraph::components(g)$membership
    # stable 1..K
    sfp$pu_raw <- as.integer(match(memb, sort(unique(memb))))
  }

  pu_map <- data.table(patch_id = sfp$patch_id, pu_raw = sfp$pu_raw)
  pu_map <- pu_map[is.finite(patch_id) & is.finite(pu_raw)]

  # --- filter PUs by min_pop_km2 (sum of patch areas) ---
  pu_area <- merge(pu_map, area, by = "patch_id")
  pu_area <- pu_area[, .(pu_area_km2 = sum(patch_area_km2, na.rm = TRUE)), by = pu_raw]
  keep_pu <- pu_area[pu_area_km2 >= min_pop_km2, pu_raw]
  if (!length(keep_pu)) return(list(n1 = n1, reused = FALSE, lut = empty_lut()))

  keep_pu <- sort(unique(keep_pu))
  pu_map[, pu_id := match(pu_raw, keep_pu)]
  pu_map <- pu_map[is.finite(pu_id), .(patch_id, pu_id)]

  # reindex patch_id to be compact after PU filter (helps downstream debugging)
  keep_patch <- sort(unique(pu_map$patch_id))
  patch_new <- setNames(seq_along(keep_patch), keep_patch)
  pu_map[, patch_id := as.integer(patch_new[as.character(patch_id)])]
  area2 <- area[patch_id %in% keep_patch]
  area2[, patch_id := as.integer(patch_new[as.character(patch_id)])]
  setkey(area2, patch_id)

  out <- merge(pu_map, area2, by = "patch_id")
  out[, `:=`(scientificName = sci, species = sp_id)]
  setcolorder(out, c("scientificName", "species", "patch_id", "pu_id", "patch_area_km2"))
  out <- out[order(patch_id, pu_id)]

  list(n1 = n1, reused = FALSE, lut = out[])
}

if (!run_work) {
  cat("[build] Skipping (build=FALSE, or outputs complete and overwrite=FALSE).\n")
} else {

  # cache state (one entry per species, updated stage-by-stage)
  prev_n <- rep(NA_real_, nrow(sp))
  prev_lut <- replicate(nrow(sp), empty_lut(), simplify = FALSE)

  for (k in seq_len(nrow(st))) {
  
    s <- as.integer(st$stage[k])
    s_dir <- st$dir[k]
    out_path <- file.path(lut_root, sprintf("%s%04d.rds", lut_prefix, s))
  
    cat(sprintf("[stage %04d] %s\n",
                s,
                if (file.exists(out_path) && !overwrite) "(exists; will recompute cache, skip write)" else ""))
  
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(sp))) {
  
      # ---- progress every 5 species (and always at the end) ----
      if ((i %% 5L) == 0L || i == nrow(sp)) {
        cat(sprintf("  [stage %04d] species %d/%d\n", s, i, nrow(sp)))
      }
  
      tif_path <- file.path(s_dir, sp$file[i])
  
      # (re)build lookup for this species at this stage
      # NOTE: build_lut_one() now does the monotone-cache check internally.
      res <- build_lut_one(
        tif_path      = tif_path,
        sci           = sp$scientificName[i],
        sp_id         = sp$species[i],
        min_patch_km2 = sp$min_patch_km2[i],
        min_pop_km2   = sp$min_pop_km2[i],
        disp_km       = sp$disp_km[i],
        tpl           = tpl,
        cell_km       = cell_km,
        auto_align    = auto_align,
        use_cache     = use_cache,
        prev_n1       = prev_n[i]
      )
      
      # Always update prev_n (even if reused)
      prev_n[i] <- res$n1
      
      # Only update the cached LUT if we recomputed
      if (!isTRUE(res$reused)) {
        prev_lut[[i]] <- res$lut
      }
      
      rm(res); gc(FALSE)
    }

    # stage output = bind latest per-species luts (some may be empty)
    if (!(file.exists(out_path) && !overwrite)) {
      out_dt <- rbindlist(prev_lut, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
      saveRDS(out_dt, out_path)
      rm(out_dt); gc(FALSE)
      cat("  wrote: ", basename(out_path), "\n", sep = "")
    }
  }

  cat("[build] Done.\n")
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 02_fingerprint — tiny provenance record for this analysis step
# ============================================================

fp <- list(
  created_at = Sys.time(),
  curve = curve,
  out_curve = out_curve,
  ana = ana,
  rank_int = int_root,
  rank_lut = lut_root,
  stages = st$stage,
  n_species = nrow(sp),
  outputs = list(
    lut_files = file.path(lut_root, sprintf("%s%04d.rds", lut_prefix, st$stage))
  ),
  params = as.list(params)
)

saveRDS(fp, fp_path)
cat("[fp] Wrote: ", fp_path, "\n", sep = "")
```
